# ComboPaste — Free Temporary Combolist Pastebin

> Free anonymous pastebin for combolist sharing. Paste your list, set auto-expiry (1h, 6h, 1d, 7d, 30d, or forever), and get a shareable link. No account needed, no logs, Cloudflare protected.

## Pages
- Homepage: https://combopaste.site/
- Create paste (POST): https://combopaste.site/v/create
- View paste: https://combopaste.site/v/{id}
- Raw download: https://combopaste.site/raw/{id}

## Features
- Temporary hosting with auto-expiry
- No account or registration required
- No logs or tracking
- Cloudflare Worker proxy (origin hidden)
- Free to use
